name: Lemon Bundt
recipeIngredient: 1 cup hot water from the tap
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the lemon cake mix and lemon instant pudding.
2. Add the eggs, poppy seeds, oil, and hot water to the mixture.
3. Beat the mixture for 7 minutes until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a prepared bundt pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes.
6. Glaze with a mixture of icing sugar and lemon juice if desired.
